material_claims.claim: PIP-6 records first-round advancing candidates, while PIP-7 identifies the first final elected Council roster.
PIP-11, PIP-25, and PIP-27 preserve completed election activity but do not establish final winner identities in the captured record.
PIP-13, PIP-15, PIP-19, and PIP-26 failed and therefore did not supply proposal authorization.

PIP-14 passed and was later Council-reported terminated, PIP-17 passed and was later Council-reported canceled or terminated, and PIP-31 passed and was later Council-reported withdrawn and not implemented.
Council-reported terminal states independently prove payment, deliverable failure, or the exact terminal date.
material_claims.reason: The Council tracker is an attributed operational assessment and lacks complete independent transaction, deliverable, and dated-notice evidence.

material_claims.claim: Aggregate election ballot or PVP totals can be converted into candidate-level results.
material_claims.reason: Candidate-level PVP is absent from the preserved portal captures and cannot be reconstructed by inference.

known_limitations: Final winner records remain missing for later Council and DAO Casters elections.
Council tracker states must retain Council attribution and independent verification status UNKNOWN.
Termination, cancellation, withdrawal, supersession, failure, and missing execution evidence remain distinct states.
